_comment: Product-type expert checklists. Each entry has a 'triggers' list (regex patterns matched against the field_of_invention text) and 'expert_categories' — what a domain expert ALWAYS asks about that product type regardless of what the inventor wrote. These supply the DEPTH that the field_of_invention anchor alone cannot.

expert_categories.name: Substrate & Form Factor
questions: Is the display substrate glass or polymer (e.g. PMMA, PC, PET)? Specify the material grade, thickness (mm), and supplier.
Is the heater film flexible or rigid? If flexible, what is the minimum bend radius (mm) without cracking or delamination?
What are the overall dimensions (width × height × thickness in mm) of the heater film as delivered?
Does the CTE of the heater film match the display substrate? Provide CTE values (ppm/°C) for both and state the acceptable mismatch.

expert_categories.name: Bonding & Interface Method
questions: Is the adhesive / optical gel pre-applied to the heater film, pre-applied to the display surface, or applied wet at assembly? Describe the assembly sequence.
Is the bonding method peel-and-stick (PSA liner), liquid optical clear adhesive (LOCA), optical bonding gel, or mechanical clamping?
What is the adhesive thickness (µm), peel strength (N/25mm), and operating temperature range of the bonding layer?
Does the bonding layer introduce optical distortion (haze %, refractive index mismatch)? Provide measured values.
What surface preparation (cleaning, plasma treatment, primer) is required on the display side before bonding?

expert_categories.name: Thermal Activation & Operating Range
questions: At what ambient or surface temperature (°C) does the heater activate? Is this a fixed threshold or dew-point controlled?
What is the maximum continuous operating surface temperature (°C) the heater is designed to maintain?
What is the maximum power density (W/m²) the heater can deliver without damaging the display or adhesive layer?
What is the thermal response time — how many seconds from activation to reaching the target surface temperature at worst-case ambient?
Is heater operation proportional (PID), bang-bang (on/off), or open-loop (fixed duty cycle)? Provide the control algorithm.

expert_categories.name: Electrical & Power Interface
questions: What is the supply voltage range (V DC or AC, Hz) and maximum current draw (A) of the heater?
What is the nominal sheet resistance (Ω/sq) of the heating element and how does it vary with temperature?
How are electrical connections made to the heater film — solder tabs, conductive adhesive, ITO bus bars, flex cable connector? Provide terminal layout drawing.
What over-temperature protection is built into the heater (thermal fuse, PTC element, NTC sensor cutoff)? Specify trip temperature.

expert_categories.name: Environmental Qualification & Certification
questions: What environmental qualification standards must the heater film meet? (e.g. MIL-STD-810 for military, DO-160 for avionics, IEC 60068 for industrial, EN 50155 for railway)
What is the operating temperature range (min to max °C) and storage temperature range required for each target deployment environment?
What humidity, condensation, and frost test conditions must the heater survive and function through? Provide the condensation onset delta-T and required clearance time.
What vibration and mechanical shock profile (g, Hz, duration) must the bonded heater-display assembly withstand without delamination or electrical failure?
What dielectric strength (V/mm) and insulation resistance (MΩ) are required between the heater element and the display surface?

expert_categories.name: Structural Design & Optical Architecture
questions: Provide top-view, cross-section, and ray-diagram drawings showing the light injection geometry and overall light guide structure.
Explain the novel extraction structure including any symmetry or complementary behaviour for dual-edge or multi-edge illumination.
Clarify whether the extraction pattern is mathematically defined and provide the governing formula, if any.

expert_categories.name: Dot / Feature Geometry & Light Extraction
questions: Describe dot or feature geometry in detail: shape, size range (µm), depth (µm), pitch variation from edge to centre.
How does dot size or density change toward the centre to compensate for attenuation of the guided light?
How does changing dot geometry (shape, size, depth, spacing) affect light extraction efficiency and luminance uniformity %?

expert_categories.name: Material, Fabrication & Performance
questions: Specify the material and refractive index of the light guide substrate.
Describe the fabrication method used to realise the extraction pattern (injection moulding, laser engraving, screen printing).
Provide measured performance data: uniformity %, luminous efficiency (lm/W), and thickness vs. prior-art comparison.

expert_categories.name: LED Arrangement & Selective Activation
questions: Provide a drawing of the PCB showing the physical arrangement and interleavingpattern of Day and NVG LEDs.
Explain the selective activation mechanism — how are Day and NVG LED circuits isolated to prevent cross-illumination?
What is the LED pitch (mm) and the minimum spacing required to achieve uniform illumination across the display area?

expert_categories.name: Mechanical & Thermal Design
questions: How does the single-PCB design preserve the original mechanical footprint and connector interface of the legacy assembly?
What is the thermal resistance (°C/W) from LED junction to PCB and from PCB to chassis? Provide thermal management approach.
What are the PCB dimensions, layer count, and copper weight used for the power planes?

expert_categories.name: Coating Composition & Deposition
questions: What is the layer stack (material, refractive index, physical thickness in nm) for each coating layer?
What deposition process is used (sputtering, PECVD, sol-gel, dip coating)? Provide process parameters.
What substrate preparation (cleaning, plasma activation) is required before coating?

expert_categories.name: Optical & Mechanical Performance
questions: What is the measured reflectance (%) and transmittance (%) across the target wavelength range?
What pencil hardness and abrasion resistance (Taber test, cycles to failure) does the coating achieve?
What environmental durability is demonstrated (humidity, thermal cycling, UV exposure per IEC 62788)?
